'''thongayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meandering|meandering]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meandering|meandering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thongayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongayithi|thongayithi]] || [[word:thongayiji|thongayiji]] || [[word:thongayishi|thongayishi]] || [[word:thongayiki|thongayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongayuthuthu|thongayuthuthu]] || [[word:thongayujuju|thongayujuju]] || [[word:thongayushushu|thongayushushu]] || [[word:thongayukuku|thongayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongayuthu|thongayuthu]] || [[word:thongayuju|thongayuju]] || [[word:thongayushu|thongayushu]] || [[word:thongayuku|thongayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongayufthuf|thongayufthuf]] || [[word:thongayufjuf|thongayufjuf]] || [[word:thongayufshuf|thongayufshuf]] || [[word:thongayufkuf|thongayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongayethe|thongayethe]] || [[word:thongayeje|thongayeje]] || [[word:thongayeshe|thongayeshe]] || [[word:thongayeke|thongayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongayothotho|thongayothotho]] || [[word:thongayojojo|thongayojojo]] || [[word:thongayoshosho|thongayoshosho]] || [[word:thongayokoko|thongayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongayotho|thongayotho]] || [[word:thongayojo|thongayojo]] || [[word:thongayosho|thongayosho]] || [[word:thongayoko|thongayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongayofthof|thongayofthof]] || [[word:thongayofjof|thongayofjof]] || [[word:thongayofshof|thongayofshof]] || [[word:thongayofkof|thongayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfthĂŻf|thongayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfjĂŻf|thongayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfshĂŻf|thongayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfkĂŻf|thongayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thongayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thongayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thongayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thongayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfthĂŻf|thongayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfjĂŻf|thongayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfshĂŻf|thongayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfkĂŻf|thongayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfthĂŻf|thongayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfjĂŻf|thongayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfshĂŻf|thongayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongayĂŻfkĂŻf|thongayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongayĂŠthĂŠ|thongayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thongayĂŠjĂŠ|thongayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thongayĂŠshĂŠ|thongayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thongayĂŠkĂŠ|thongayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongayathatha|thongayathatha]] || [[word:thongayajaja|thongayajaja]] || [[word:thongayashasha|thongayashasha]] || [[word:thongayakaka|thongayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongayatha|thongayatha]] || [[word:thongayaja|thongayaja]] || [[word:thongayasha|thongayasha]] || [[word:thongayaka|thongayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongayafthaf|thongayafthaf]] || [[word:thongayafjaf|thongayafjaf]] || [[word:thongayafshaf|thongayafshaf]] || [[word:thongayafkaf|thongayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thongayasha|thongayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongayshĂ«sha|thongayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongayrosha|thongayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongaymusha|thongaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongayasha|thongayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongaynkshĂ«sha|gothongaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongaynkrosha|gothongaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongaynkmusha|gothongaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongaynkyasha|gothongaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thongangayasha|thongangayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongangayshĂ«sha|thongangayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongangayrosha|thongangayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongangaymusha|thongangaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongangayasha|thongangayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongangaynkshĂ«sha|gothongangaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongangaynkrosha|gothongangaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongangaynkmusha|gothongangaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongangaynkyasha|gothongangaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thengĂŠyasha|thengĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thengĂŠyshĂ«sha|thengĂŠyshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thengĂŠyrosha|thengĂŠyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thengĂŠymusha|thengĂŠymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thengĂŠyasha|thengĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothengĂŠynkshĂ«sha|gothengĂŠynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothengĂŠynkrosha|gothengĂŠynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothengĂŠynkmusha|gothengĂŠynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothengĂŠynkyasha|gothengĂŠynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thongfayasha|thongfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongfayshĂ«sha|thongfayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongfayrosha|thongfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongfaymusha|thongfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongfayasha|thongfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongfaynkshĂ«sha|gothongfaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongfaynkrosha|gothongfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongfaynkmusha|gothongfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongfaynkyasha|gothongfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
